programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Luke, who's lost his dating mojo, is raring to re-invigorate his love life and find a lady to relight his fire. And can pole dancer Abi find someone to send her heart into a spin.

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Katey and Dan plan a night of fun with Josh and Holly. Nicolle and Ben try a couple swap, but can Nicolle overcome her anxieties.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The normally infallible Alex Horne makes a rare, condiment-based error for which he will no doubt be punished by the seething Taskmaster. And Joanna Page smashes up a sheep.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hypnotherapist Howard, who loves competition, hopes to enchant his rivals with his intriguingly named food. But his 'Pendulum of Truth' is not everyone's idea of fun.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Outspoken Louise plans a 'fabulous' menu including 'Lou's magical mousse'. But it's a night of cutting criticism and probing questions.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Management consultant David entertains his guests with some Vegas showgirls, but makes a major blunder with his food when he mixes up the vegetarian and meat mains.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Customer services manager Helen plans an authentic Indian menu, on a night of glamorous discoveries and dodgy disguises.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Salesman Simon goes all out to impress with his fine-dining fare. But will he be thrown off course by some of his guests' low blows.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mum-of-three Clare kicks off the week with a hot and spicy Indian menu of pakoras, lamb curry and mango ice cream and some hit-and-miss hula-hooping.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Comedy promoter David hasn't made the best impression so far...! Can his night of caviar, scallops, beef fillet, oysters, class divisions chat and carrot colours impress.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Marketing consultant Liz hopes to impress her guests with a sophisticated French evening. But now that David's night is out of the way, he's not holding back..

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Club singer John hopes to hit the right notes with his travel-inspired menu and a musical surprise. But there's a heated debate over John's idol, Celine Dion.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: With tensions rising between the guests, can spiritual Vicky and her amethyst crystal bring the group together on the final night.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In north London and Hertfordshire, Dawn and Simon bond with hipsters Darren and Sian, but can any of them find common ground with multi-lingual lawyer Ayesha and astrophysicist Stephen.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: We revisit Shane, who dreamt of a new life on the north Kent coast, and Indu and Jason, who wanted a family home with potential in Guildford. Did they get what they wished for.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Gill and Rhys love the charming Dordogne countryside so much that a permanent move is on the cards. Craig Rowe shows them what £190k can buy in Bergerac. Do any of his options hit the mark.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps B&B owners Andy and Julian find their dream property on Gran Canaria. With £125k to spend, will they love anywhere enough to put in an offer.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Teacher Wendy's looking for her dream Italian holiday home in Puglia. Jean Johannson lines up five great properties for her £200k. Will any of them get top marks.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Rachel and Robin dream of buying a holiday home - which could later become their permanent home - in Alicante's Jalón Valley. Can Ben Hillman find their perfect place for £250k.

programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: Christy and Matt pour £1m into a seven-bed house in serious need of TLC. Heather and Dave take on converted stables that they bought when they were on holiday.

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: There's one last hoorah in the Sunday school hall before it becomes the pottery studio, as Keith and Marj turn it into a party venue and bring singing back to the chapel.

programme.title: Salisbury Poisonings: The Untold Story
programme.desc: A shocking account of the 2018 poisoning of ex-spy Sergei Skripal, with gripping first-hand testimony. Was Britain on the verge of a serious international conflict.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Josh, who's 27, has come off his motorbike at speed. Georgie arrives at A&E with her 10-month-old son Phoenix, who's been sucking on a bleach tablet.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers settle down for I'm a Celebrity... South Africa, Virgin Island, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, The Neighbourhood, Made in Chelsea and How to Clean-Up for Cash.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics cast their eyes over Your Song, University Challenge, I'm a Celebrity... South Africa, MasterChef, Emmerdale, The Assembly, Made in Chelsea, and more.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The normally infallible Alex Horne makes a rare, condiment-based error for which he will no doubt be punished by the seething Taskmaster. And Joanna Page smashes up a sheep.

programme.title: Super Surgeons: A Chance at Life
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at the world-leading Royal Marsden Hospital, as surgeons attempt pioneering cancer treatments, including a high-risk bid to save a woman's voice box.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Air ambulance medics race to help a teen with major brain injury after a car collision. And 10-year-old Jack is confused and nauseous from a bang on the head.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At the Who'd a Thought It in Kent, Joe and Alex start the week in style with complimentary champagne. But guest Brian's not so bubbly at breakfast, after the noisy hot tub kept him awake.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Owner Matthew and entertainment manager Liam welcome their rivals to their family-friendly B&B, the New Osborne Hotel, in Blackpool. But there are grumbles about room size and cleanliness.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the Fairy Falls Hotel in Trefriw, North Wales, where B&B newbies Jackie and Paul take their guests to a maze. But things go awry overnight and at breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The fourth visit is to Liz and Brian's Great Trewern B&B in Llandrindod Wells. But the shared bathroom facilities don't wash with two of the couples.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition and the B&Bers meet for the last time to find out how much they've been paid and to settle some scores, before the winner is announced.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Sawcliffe Manor in Lincolnshire, where one guest has a milk bath while another has a beef about the lack of vegan options at breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Charlotte and Donna host the second visit at Rooms at the Inn in Nottinghamshire, where one guest gets cocky about his own chances and the hosts are left with an earache.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On day three, Rob hosts at his vineyard and glampsite in Nottinghamshire. What will his guests make of gravy wine and a chicken invasion at breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Karlie hosts the final visit at her holiday park in Greater Manchester, where lavish lodges and hot tubs are a hit. But one pair still find cause to moan about their mattress..

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ding-dongs over décor. And grumblings about... gravy-scented wine. It's a unique payment day on Four in a Bed - but who will reign supreme and win the week.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole meet Gaby, whose garden is strewn with interesting items. Henry finds a vintage sack barrow while Simon unearths a shepherd's stove in the undergrowth.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In North Wales, Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole meet Anne and her grandson Tom. Simon unearths an art deco fire guard... but what will he do with it.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole head to Suffolk and Constable Country, where Henry finds a miniature hay wain to lovingly restore.

programme.title: Cruising to the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: An unforgettable voyage to the most awe-inspiring destinations. From Alaska's ice fields to the sun-drenched port of Messina in Sicily, we see what cruise ship life is really like.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lisa and Wayne got married on Corfu, in the town of Kassiopi. Can Laura Hamilton find their perfect holiday home in this special place for £130k.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Liz dreams of owning a holiday home in her favourite part of Catalunya: Sitges. Will any of Jasmine Harman's options for £180k impress her enough to make an offer.

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Dog behaviour specialist Sue pulls out all the stops to help long-term resident Lady finally find a home after a long year of searching.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers settle down for I'm a Celebrity... South Africa, Virgin Island, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, The Neighbourhood, Made in Chelsea and How to Clean-Up for Cash.

programme.title: Beast
programme.desc: Thrilling romp starring Idris Elba as an all-action doctor who must protect his family from a man-slaying lion in the wilds of South Africa, armed with a jeep and a keen right hook.

programme.title: The Old Man and the Gun
programme.desc: Fact-based crime biopic starring Robert Redford and Sissy Spacek. Charming 74-year-old bank robber Forrest Tucker falls for an enchanting farmer. But is he ready to retire.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: First Dates, Squid Game, Olivia Attwood: The Price of Perfection, Match Me Abroad, Building the Band and BBC News (bingo and Oasis).

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Luke, who's lost his dating mojo, is raring to re-invigorate his love life and find a lady to relight his fire. And can pole dancer Abi find someone to send her heart into a spin.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Secret Service
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay infiltrates struggling restaurants with the help of a secret insider. Can he pull a dysfunctional diner back from the brink of bankruptcy.
